title: Machine Learning Engineer
desc: Building and deploying ML systems in production. Working across the full stack of machine learning — data pipelines, model training, deployment, and monitoring. Remote work suits my nature: I focus on the work, not the office.

title: AI/ML Consultant
desc: Advising R&D Centers on artificial intelligence and machine learning strategy, research direction, and implementation. Bridging the gap between cutting-edge research and practical engineering solutions.

title: M.Sc. Artificial Intelligence
desc: Deepening my understanding of AI from the mathematical foundations upward. Because you can't truly engineer what you don't deeply understand.
